pricing.refundPolicy: No refunds on services purchased per the legal refund policy. Specific promotional offers may vary.

payouts.schedule: Varies by model. Bi-weekly payouts standard on many funded models. Instant Standard uses Triple Payday (5th, 15th, 25th). Reward on Demand available on eligible challenge models — requires 3% profit over at least 3 trading days with 0.5% profit on each day. First Reward on Demand payout paid at 40% split, then returns to usual split.

rules.notes: Challenge types include 1-Step, 2-Step (GOAT, Standard, PRO variants), 3-Step, Instant (GOAT, Standard), Goat Blitz, and Pay Later models. Daily drawdown varies by model: 1-Step 4%, 2-Step GOAT 4%, 2-Step Standard 5%, 3-Step 4%, Instant GOAT 3% trailing. Max drawdown varies: 1-Step 6%, 2-Step GOAT 10%, 2-Step Standard 10%, 3-Step 8%, Instant GOAT 6% trailing. News trading allowed but profits from trades opened or closed within 5 minutes before or after high-impact news are capped at 1% of initial balance — excess profit removed. Weekend holding allowed on main models but may be subject to risk review or model-specific conditions. Copy trading / mirroring between accounts is banned. EAs restricted — GFT can require proof of ownership / source code, bans third-party or commercial challenge-passing EAs, and bans HFT-style EA use. No hedging. No all-or-nothing / gambling-style trading — margin usage above 80% in a single position is prohibited. 2-minute minimum trade duration rule applies. Goat Guard: on funded accounts (excluding Instant), auto-closes trades when floating loss reaches 2% of account balance — first trigger cuts profit split to 50%, second trigger breaches the account. Funded accounts have a $3,000 daily profit limit — profit above that is deducted but is not a breach. First two reward requests capped at 6% of initial balance — restriction removed after that. Reward on Demand requires 3% profit over at least 3 trading days with at least 0.5% profit on each of those 3 days. First Reward on Demand payout is paid at 40% split, then later payouts return to usual split. Standard profit split is 80% with 100% available as add-on. Min withdrawal $100. KYC required before first withdrawal. Accounts are fully simulated using real market quotes. Forex leverage: Two-Step/Three-Step eval 1:100, One-Step eval 1:30, funded 1:50. Indices 1:10, Commodities 1:10, Crypto 1:2, Stocks 1:5. GFT states funded leverage can increase based on risk management.

markets.instruments: Forex, Indices, Metals, Commodities, Stocks, Crypto

notableFlags: Simulated environment with real market quotes
Goat Guard auto-close feature on funded accounts
